entities.name: SOIL ACIDITY

entities.description: The process of growing crops for food or other purposes

entities.description: A region in India where acidic soils are prevalent

entities.name: WEATHERING
entities.description: The process of breaking down rocks and minerals, contributing to soil acidity in humid tropical regions

entities.name: PH
entities.description: A measure of acidity or alkalinity used to categorize soil acidity levels

entities.name: ODISHA

entities.name: ICRISAT
